reviews.review_description: Loved it! The puzzles were very unique, had to use my little grey cells. Graphics were beautiful. Very good story and characters. Can’t wait for the next adventure with Katrin.

I love this game however I am stuck on beneath the chapel 3. I have an enemy fire, earth and water golem and I have two earth golems and a fire. I have spent hours on this and can only get the enemy’s at 5 and mine at 5. It’s almost like I am missing a card is it a bug or am stupid? Can someone help me?

developer_response.body: Hello Sooters!  The "Beneath the Chapel 3" puzzle is a lot harder than it looks!  Please join our discord (https://discord.gg/68nFgy6naq) and we can give you a hint, or even tell you the complete solution.  Thanks for playing and reviewing!  :D

reviews.review_description: An excellent puzzle adventure with a great story and unique puzzles. These aren't the usual puzzles reskinned for a new game. The puzzles start off pretty easy then get generally more intricate and difficult as the player gets the idea how the puzzles work. The story is satisfying and based in history and legend. The average person will probably complete the game in about 8 hours (my first playthrough took longer). Good music, good graphics, challenging puzzles, great story, a bit of magic makes this game a must for those who love a puzzle adventure.

developer_response.body: Thanks, Phaenomenal, for playing, and for your review!

reviews.review_description: Enjoyed playing the game very much. A wonderful mix of card-battle puzzles with escape-room style puzzles. good variety of puzzle difficulties. Excellent support on Discord channel. Recommended

I got hung up several times reached out to developer and they were Johnny on the spot about helping me. One of the best games I’ve played. I absolutely love these types of games. Keep up the awesome work!!

Really enjoying this game and even though I'm stuck at the moment I know I will figure it out sooner or later. The fighting system using cards is fantastic and makes battles and thinking really enjoyable. Would love to see a continuing adventure using the cards system of fighting. Very happy with how crystal clear the graphics are.  I was impressed when I met the sorceress and noticed something that kinda freaked me out a bit. Won't give it away so as not to spoil things. I am looking foward to getting my brain working and continuing my escape. I already know that when I finish this game I will wish there was more. Great work Devs.

developer_response.body: Many thanks for your positive comments!  We are thinking about continuing with this card system of fighting, so thanks for your encouragement in that direction!  :D

reviews.review_description:
This game has a really good story and really good puzzles that will get you thinking without being crazy difficult. And the fights are turn based card battles that also get your brain working. Really liking this 👌

Just finished the game in just under 5hrs. Was great from beginning to end. However the last 2 fights I found just a little too easy

developer_response.body: Hi jakenut86!  Thanks for the review!  And I hope you finish the game!  There's lots of cool stuff in the final chapters!  :D

reviews.review_description:
This game is brilliant;

Fantastic graphics, puzzles, story, user friendly but challenging.

Have not finished the game but so far its one of the best VR games I have played 

Well done to the developers 👍

developer_response.body: Many thanks for playing, and posting your review!  We're excited for you to finish the  game!  There's lots of good stuff toward the end!  :D  And speaking of "best VR games", you should play Ghost Town!

reviews.review_description: A nice combination of challenging puzzles and tactical card mini game.  Plus an interesting story. Try out the demo first and if you like it, it is very likely you will like the full game too.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing the demo and the full game!  Glad you enjoyed it all!  :D
Thanks for playing!  You're our first review!  :D

reviews.review_description:
Escape from Hadrian’s Wall is a very well-made VR escape experience. The puzzles are smart, logical, and fair, with a good difficulty balance that keeps you engaged without becoming frustrating.

The visuals are beautiful, the sound design adds a lot to the tension and immersion, and the pacing is just right. It’s clear that a lot of care and passion went into this experience

What I appreciated most is how absorbing the game is — it completely pulled me in and honestly saved my holidays by giving me something genuinely enjoyable and relaxing to play.

If you like VR escape games with strong puzzle design, this is an easy recommendation.

I would definitely love to see a sequel or continuation of this experience.

developer_response.body: Hi frezo88!  Thanks for your review!  Glad to hear how much you enjoyed the game!
